task_completion.description: Open the tesla_analysis.xml portfolio file in Portfolio Performance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Portfolio Performance application window is open and the title bar or active workspace indicates that 'tesla_analysis.xml' is loaded.
'Tesla Inc' (or TSLA) is visible and selected in the 'All Securities', 'Historical Prices', or 'Events' view within the application.

task_completion.description: Open the dialog to add an event or note for Tesla Inc
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or panel titled 'Add Event', 'Edit Event', or 'Note' is open and clearly associated with the Tesla Inc security.
The date input field in the event/note dialog displays '2024-10-10' (or the locale equivalent, such as '10/10/2024').
The text input field for the event note or label contains the exact text 'Cybercab Reveal Event'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the portfolio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk) in the toolbar, uses the 'File -> Save' menu, or the asterisk (*) next to the filename in the title bar disappears, indicating the file is saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Portfolio Performance graphical interface rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The event was created using the application's built-in features
integrity.visual_evidence: The event is added via the proper application dialogs (e.g., right-clicking a chart or security and selecting 'Add Event'/'Add Note'), not by editing an image or using external tools.

integrity.description: The file was saved from within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is performed via the Portfolio Performance UI (toolbar icon or menu), rather than a background script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target portfolio file is 'tesla_analysis.xml' located in '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData'. The target security is 'Tesla Inc' (ISIN: US88160R1014). The event must be dated exactly '2024-10-10' and the note/label must be 'Cybercab Reveal Event'.
